videos.title: MoonLight v0.7.0
videos.description:
This video introduces version 0.7.0 of MoonLight
MoonLight is open source software to control LEDs and lights, running on a microcontroller (ESP32)

Please like and subscribe (more tutorials will follow)

0:00 - Introduction
0:59 - Building MoonLight 🎶
1:43 - Receiving Art-Net
3:59 - Sending Art-Net
6:31 - Board presets
8:13 - Installer
9:37 - Devices 🎶
11:30 - Effects
12:45 - Final thoughts
14:28 - End credits 🎶

Products used in this video:
 - Serg Universal Shield:  https://www.tindie.com/products/serg74/wled-shield-board-for-addressable-leds/
 - Serg ESP32-16MB: https://www.tindie.com/products/serg74/esp32-wroom-usb-c-d1-mini32-form-factor-board/
 - Myhome control ESP32-P4-Nano Shield: https://shop.myhome-control.de/ABC-WLED-ESP32-P4-Shield/HW10027
- Quinled Dig2Go: https://quinled.info/quinled-dig2go/
- Quinled Dig Uno: https://quinled.info/pre-assembled-quinled-dig-uno/
- Quinled Dig Quad: https://quinled.info/pre-assembled-quinled-dig-quad/
- Quinled Dig Octa stack: https://quinled.info/quinled-dig-octa/
- Resolume Arena: https://resolume.com

MoonLight Videos
https://youtu.be/l6lTDG6EdEA
https://youtu.be/Z70zDhpqY8o
https://youtu.be/7DQOEWa-Kwg
https://youtu.be/bJIgiBBx3lg
https://youtu.be/tdrU9yGkyVo
https://youtu.be/NnEV9RplZN8

Links
- https://discord.gg/TC8NSUSCdV
- https://www.reddit.com/r/MoonModules/
- GitHub: https://github.com/MoonModules/MoonLight
- MoonModules: https://moonmodules.org/
- MoonLight Website: https://moonmodules.org/MoonLight/
- MoonLight Installer: https://moonmodules.org/MoonLight/gettingstarted/installer/

videos.title: MoonLight Developer Quick Start
videos.description:
This video is a Quickstart for developers to add functionality to MoonLight
MoonLight is open source software to control LEDs and lights, running on a microcontroller (ESP32)

0:00 Introduction
2:10 GitHub Fork
3:37 Install VSCode
4:21 GitHib Clone
6:09 Add new effect
12:27 Install PlatformIO extension
13:32 Documentation
14:43 Flash Firmware
16:45 Test new effect
17:38 Modifier, Layout and Driver nodes
18:44 GitHub Branch and Commit
20:47 GitHub Pull Request
21:47 Final remarks

Please like and subscribe (more tutorials will come)

Check also the other videos in this channel, e.g.:

https://youtu.be/Z70zDhpqY8o
https://youtu.be/7DQOEWa-Kwg
https://youtu.be/bJIgiBBx3lg

More info:

MoonLight Website: https://moonmodules.org/MoonLight/
MoonLight on Github https://github.com/MoonModules/MoonLight
